_comment: White-label config for this deployment. Copy this project, change THIS file + point the ytf-ops-tools generators at the client's data sources, and you have a new branded ops cockpit. The shell (search, security, intelligence, trends, inventory, finance, sites, quality/WCM, Galaxy/iStock adapter) is generic; vertical modules (e.g. tyre claims) toggle via `modules` (set any to false to hide its tiles/section/search). `feed_prefix` MUST match the server's FEED_PREFIX env var (the feed files are named <feed_prefix>-ops.json etc).
search_placeholder: Search tyres, materials, claims, TFT, stock, actions...
